query: SELECT id, dataType, payload, receivedAt FROM n8n_webhook_data ORDER BY receivedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user c2WHekeR1zM1ZDu.root --database fKvyyNk7oPfYfEqykoWEyN --execute SELECT id, dataType, payload, receivedAt FROM n8n_webhook_data ORDER BY receivedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
